$description.$value: Component foreground color token for the icon_slot element. Resolves via the semantic chain to the contextual neutral foreground. Do: Assign to icon foreground in any context where the icon inherits the surrounding text color. Avoid: Do not override with a literal color value — always reference via the token chain.

fg.$description: Default color token for icon fills. Reacts to lightness (light / dark) mode via ob.s.color.neutral. Parent components may override the color — especially interaction components such as button.
